name: AI Incident Law
description: Structured public-record reference for legal, regulatory, tribunal, and review-queue matters involving AI-related incidents, failures, and harms.

endpoints.description: Obligation-First API manifest with available generated files and counts.
Authorities generated from included public matters.
Proceedings generated from included public matters.
Allegations describing AI-related failures asserted in public records.
Determinations for included matters with resolving postures.
Individual generated Obligation-First record by ID.

actions.name: search_records
actions.description: Search the public AI Incident Law dataset by keyword using the local MCP stdio server.

actions.name: get_record
actions.description: Fetch a full public AI Incident Law source record by stable ID using the local MCP stdio server.

actions.name: get_obligation_first_record
actions.description: Fetch a generated Obligation-First authority, proceeding, allegation, or determination record.

actions.name: get_staleness_report
actions.description: Report record verification decay, ranked oldest-verified first, to find matters overdue for re-verification.

usage_notes: This is a public-record reference, not legal advice.
Check last_verified_date or last_checked_date before presenting a record as current.
Preferred dataset attribution: AI Incident Law, PAICE.work PBC, CC BY 4.0.
